name: keryx
description: Kēryx — registry of ~20 real executable tools (Solana onchain data, crypto prices, weather, finance, geo, DNS, web/GitHub, utilities) callable over MCP. Direct API calls use x402 with real USDC settlement on Arc testnet (contract 0x7eA3…8bA7). MCP endpoint currently subsidized in demo mode because MCP clients do not yet carry payment primitives; this is documented on the /docs page. 95% of paid direct-API calls go to publishers. No local install scripts. Prior demo scripts (traction/submission) were removed in v0.1.3 — see CHANGELOG.md.
